body.raw: {"query":"query getUserPushNotifications($limit: Int, $tenant: Tenant!) { getUserPushNotifications(limit: $limit, tenant: $tenant) { id createdAt adParameters analytics { genres gamecastType } attachments { mediaType mediaUrl height width editId } allowInRegions destinations { contentModuleId tagUUID } userDestination { contentModuleId tag { tagUUID hash followers { profileId id creatorId following followers } followersCount following { tagUUID hash followers followersCount following } } } destinationOverride createdBy showAlertCard alertCategories spoiler tags { tagUUID hash followers { profileId id creatorId following followers } followersCount following { tagUUID hash followers { profileId id creatorId following followers } followersCount following { tagUUID hash followers followersCount following } } } text title url } }","variables":{"limit":1,"tenant":"demo-tenant"}}
